summary: Implement comprehensive multi-tenancy support across all OpenPrint services with PostgreSQL row-level security, tenant context propagation, resource quotas, and organization management capabilities.

user_stories.so_that: I can onboard multiple customer tenants with complete data isolation
acceptance_criteria: Can create new organization with unique ID and name
Can update organization details (name, status, billing info)
Can suspend or delete organizations
Can view all organizations and their resource usage
Can assign organization owners and administrators

user_stories.i_want: to configure resource quotas per organization
user_stories.so_that: I can control resource allocation and prevent any single tenant from consuming excessive resources
acceptance_criteria: Can set max printers quota per organization
Can set storage quota in GB per organization
Can set monthly job throughput limit per organization
Can set max users per organization
Receive alerts when quotas approach 80% utilization

user_stories.i_want: to manage users within my organization
user_stories.so_that: I can control access to my organization's resources
acceptance_criteria: Can invite users to organization with role assignment
Can remove users from organization
Can update user roles within organization
Can view all users in organization
Cannot access or modify users from other organizations

user_stories.i_want: my data to be automatically isolated from other organizations
user_stories.so_that: sensitive print job and device information remains secure
acceptance_criteria: All API responses only contain organization's data
Cannot access printers, jobs, or documents from other organizations
Database queries automatically filter by organization_id
No data leakage between tenants via any API endpoint

user_stories.i_want: to view my organization's resource usage
user_stories.so_that: I can track our consumption and plan accordingly
acceptance_criteria: Can view current printer count vs quota
Can view current storage usage vs quota
Can view monthly job count vs quota
Can view user count vs quota
See usage trends over time

user_stories.i_want: to automatically enforce tenant isolation in all background jobs
user_stories.so_that: scheduled tasks and job processors cannot access cross-tenant data
acceptance_criteria: All background jobs include organization context
Job queue messages include organization_id
Scheduled tasks respect tenant boundaries
Notifications only sent to users within organization

user_stories.i_want: to provision new tenant organizations with default settings
user_stories.so_that: onboarding new customers is quick and consistent
acceptance_criteria: Can create organization from admin panel with default quotas
Organization is immediately usable after creation
Default admin user is created for organization
Default settings can be configured at platform level

user_stories.i_want: tenant context to automatically propagate through the request chain
user_stories.so_that: I don't need to manually pass organization_id in every function call
acceptance_criteria: Middleware extracts organization from JWT
Organization context available in request context
Repository layers automatically use organization from context
Cross-service calls include organization context

user_stories.i_want: to see audit logs separated by organization
user_stories.so_that: I can verify compliance and investigate security incidents per tenant
acceptance_criteria: All audit entries include organization_id
Can filter audit logs by organization
Can export audit logs for specific organization
Cross-tenant access attempts are logged with alerts

user_stories.so_that: I can configure the platform to match our needs
acceptance_criteria: Can set organization name and logo
Can configure default print settings
Can set notification preferences
Can configure data retention policies

functional_requirements.title: Organization Data Model
functional_requirements.description: Create organizations table with all required fields for multi-tenancy including unique identifiers, quotas, status, and metadata.

functional_requirements.title: Row-Level Security
functional_requirements.description: Implement PostgreSQL row-level security policies on all tables to automatically filter rows based on organization_id from the current session context.

functional_requirements.title: Tenant Context Middleware
functional_requirements.description: Create middleware that extracts organization_id from JWT claims and sets it in PostgreSQL session context for RLS and in Go request context for application logic.

functional_requirements.title: Organization Repository Layer
functional_requirements.description: Add organization_id filtering to all repository queries across all services. Ensure no query can bypass organization filtering.

functional_requirements.title: JWT Enhancement
functional_requirements.description: Add organization_id and organization_role claims to JWT tokens issued during authentication.

functional_requirements.title: Tenant Provisioning
functional_requirements.description: Implement workflow for creating new organizations including database initialization, quota assignment, and default admin user creation.

functional_requirements.title: Resource Quota Enforcement
functional_requirements.description: Create quota checking service that enforces limits before resource creation (printers, storage, jobs, users).

functional_requirements.title: Organization Management API
functional_requirements.description: Expose CRUD endpoints for organization management accessible only to platform administrators.

functional_requirements.title: Usage Tracking
functional_requirements.description: Implement real-time tracking of resource usage per organization for quota monitoring and billing.

functional_requirements.title: Cross-Service Tenant Propagation
functional_requirements.description: Ensure all inter-service calls include organization context header or claim.

functional_requirements.title: Background Job Tenant Isolation
functional_requirements.description: Modify job queue processors to extract and enforce organization context from job messages.

functional_requirements.title: Storage Isolation
functional_requirements.description: Implement organization-level isolation in document storage using path prefixes or bucket-level separation.

functional_requirements.title: Notification Filtering
functional_requirements.description: Ensure WebSocket notifications are only sent to users within the same organization as the triggering event.

functional_requirements.title: Admin Panel
functional_requirements.description: Create React-based admin panel in dashboard for organization and quota management.

functional_requirements.title: Audit Log Enhancement
functional_requirements.description: Add organization_id to all audit log entries and support filtering by organization.

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Zero data leakage between tenants under any circumstances
non_functional_requirements.metric: Cross-tenant data access must be impossible at database and application levels

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Tenant filtering must not significantly impact query performance
non_functional_requirements.metric: Query latency increase < 10% with RLS enabled

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Support thousands of organizations per database instance
Quota checks must be fast to avoid impacting resource creation
RLS policies must be comprehensive and cannot be bypassed
non_functional_requirements.metric: 100% of queries covered by RLS or application-level filtering

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Tenant isolation must not create single points of failure
non_functional_requirements.metric: One tenant's issues must not affect other tenants (99.9% isolation)

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Organization context lookup must be efficient
Rate limiting per organization to prevent resource exhaustion
non_functional_requirements.metric: Per-organization rate limits on all APIs

api_endpoints.description: Create a new organization with specified quotas and settings
List all organizations with pagination and filtering
Get detailed organization information including usage stats
Get current resource usage for the organization
Get resource quotas for the organization
Invite a user to the organization with specified role
List all users in the organization
Remove a user from the organization
Get audit logs for a specific organization
Get usage metrics and trends for the organization

columns: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
ADD COLUMN current_organization_id UUID REFERENCES organizations(id)
ADD COLUMN organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id)
ADD CONSTRAINT printers_org_check CHECK (organization_id IS NOT NULL)
ADD COLUMN organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id)
ADD CONSTRAINT print_jobs_org_check CHECK (organization_id IS NOT NULL)
ADD COLUMN organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id)
ADD CONSTRAINT documents_org_check CHECK (organization_id IS NOT NULL)
ADD COLUMN organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id)
ADD CONSTRAINT agents_org_check CHECK (organization_id IS NOT NULL)
ADD COLUMN organization_id UUID REFERENCES organizations(id)

risks.risk: RLS policies could have gaps allowing cross-tenant data access
risks.mitigation: Comprehensive security audit of all RLS policies, automated testing for data leakage, regular penetration testing
Benchmark queries with RLS enabled, add database indexes on organization_id columns, consider connection pooling optimizations

risks.risk: Existing background jobs may not respect tenant boundaries
risks.mitigation: Audit all background job processors, add organization context to all queued jobs, implement automated testing

risks.risk: Data migration for existing single-tenant deployment
risks.mitigation: Create migration script that assigns existing data to a default organization, test migration thoroughly in staging

risks.risk: JWT size increase from additional claims could impact performance
risks.mitigation: Monitor JWT sizes, implement claim compression if needed, consider shorter token lifetimes

risks.risk: Quota enforcement could become a bottleneck
risks.mitigation: Implement caching for quota data, use Redis for fast quota lookups, batch quota updates

risks.risk: Service-to-service communication could leak data across tenants
risks.mitigation: Add organization context validation in all inter-service calls, implement service mesh filters if needed

risks.risk: Complexity in multi-tenant debugging could increase MTTR
risks.mitigation: Add organization_id to all logging and tracing, enhance observability dashboards with tenant filtering

implementation_phases.name: Database Foundation
tasks: Create organizations and organization_users tables
Add organization_id columns to all existing tables
Migrate existing data to default organization
Create database indexes on organization_id columns
Create RLS policies for all tables
Write unit tests for RLS policies

implementation_phases.name: Authentication Enhancements
tasks: Add organization_id and organization_role to JWT claims
Create tenant context middleware
Update user authentication flow to set current organization
Add organization validation to authentication endpoints
Test JWT authentication with organization context

implementation_phases.name: Repository Layer Updates
tasks: Update all repository queries to filter by organization_id
Create base repository with organization filtering
Add organization context extraction in repositories
Write integration tests for data isolation
Verify no bypass is possible for organization filtering

implementation_phases.name: Organization Management APIs
implementation_phases.tasks: Implement CRUD endpoints for organizations, Create organization provisioning workflow, Implement quota management APIs, Create user invitation and management endpoints, Write API tests for organization management

implementation_phases.name: Quota Enforcement
tasks: Create quota service with Redis caching
Implement quota validation before resource creation
Add quota checks to printer registration
Add storage quota enforcement
Add job throughput quota tracking
Add user count quota enforcement

implementation_phases.name: Cross-Service Integration
tasks: Add organization context to all inter-service calls
Update service clients to propagate organization context
Modify background job processors for tenant isolation
Update notification service for tenant filtering
Test end-to-end multi-tenant flows

implementation_phases.name: Admin Panel
tasks: Create organization list and detail views
Create organization creation form
Create quota management interface
Create user management interface
Create usage metrics dashboard
Add organization filtering to existing admin views

implementation_phases.name: Testing and Documentation
tasks: Comprehensive security testing for data leakage
Performance testing with RLS enabled
Load testing with multiple organizations
Write multi-tenant setup documentation
Write API documentation for new endpoints
Create organization management guide
Update operational runbooks

implementation_phases.name: Storage Isolation
tasks: Implement organization-based path prefixing in storage-service
Update document storage operations to include organization
Migrate existing storage objects to organization-based paths
Add storage quota enforcement
Test storage isolation between tenants

implementation_phases.name: Monitoring and Observability
tasks: Add organization_id to all logging statements
Add tenant dimension to all metrics
Create per-tenant performance dashboards
Set up quota usage alerts
Create audit log filtering capabilities
Test observability with multiple active tenants
